framework.name: Premium Pricing + 10X Dish Strategy
framework.description: Independent restaurants should avoid competing on price with chains (who have massive purchasing power), instead charge premium prices. Use 3X pricing on entrees and push 10X pricing dishes (price = 10× food cost) like onion rings that have extreme margins.
framework.raw_quote: I recommend having a 3X pricing strategy on Entre and a few 10x pricing dishes that you can push hard as part of your experience
